nasb.text: Those from the peoples and tribes and tongues and nations will look at their dead bodies for three and a half days, and will not permit their dead bodies to be laid in a tomb.

esv.text: For three and a half days some from the peoples and tribes and languages and nations will gaze at their dead bodies and refuse to let them be placed in a tomb,

cnv.text: 從各民族、各支派、各方言和各邦國中，都有人觀看他們的屍首三天半，又不許人把屍首安放在墳墓裡。

ccb.text: 三天半之久，他们的尸体不得埋葬，各民族、各部落、各语言族群、各国家的人都观看他们的尸体。

csbs.text: 来自各民族、各支派、各语言群体和各国家的人，都要观看他们的尸体三天半，又不准人把他们的尸体安放在坟墓里。
